description_long: This object is a pair of over-ear headphones with a broad, cushioned headband and large, circular ear cups. The headband is thick and padded, arching smoothly to connect both ear cups, which are also well-padded for comfort. The ear cups feature a pixelated pattern and are attached to the headband with visible hinges, allowing for some adjustability. The headphones are primarily colored in pastel shades of pink and blue, giving them a modern and stylish appearance. The overall construction suggests a combination of plastic and synthetic leather, with internal components likely including metal for structural support and electronics for audio playback. These headphones are designed for personal audio use and are portable, suitable for use in urban environments such as streets, parks, or public transport.
description: A pair of pastel pink and blue over-ear headphones with a padded headband and large cushioned ear cups, featuring a pixelated design. The headphones are modern, stylish, and portable.
description_view_0: Front view showing both large, cushioned ear cups and the broad, padded headband arching above.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the circular ear cup with visible pixelated pattern and the thickness of the headband.
description_view_2: Nearly identical to the front view, showing the symmetry of the ear cups and headband.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with the other ear cup and headband details visible.
